ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the game was published */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players */,
  "min_playtime" INTEGER /* Minimum playtime in minutes */,
  "max_playtime" INTEGER /* Maximum playtime in minutes */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum recommended age */,
  "baverage" REAL /* Baseline average rating */,
  "average" REAL /* Average rating from users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "designer" TEXT /* Designer of the game */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the game */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the game (Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional review text for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_categories_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_types_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in the collection */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the game was added to the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collections_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in the wishlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the game was added to the wishlist */,
  "wishlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wishlists_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trading" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading list entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in the trading list */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the game was added to the trading list */,
  "trading_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trading_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trading_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the game */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Playtime in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Optional notes about the play session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_plays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite game */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the game was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the edition */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the edition was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_editions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_expansions" (
  "expansion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expansion */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "expansion_name" TEXT /* Name of the expansion */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the expansion was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expansion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expansion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_expansions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was posted */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Optional ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Optional caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_images_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Optional caption for the video */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the video in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_videos_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_documents_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_forums_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_forum_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_forum_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES game_forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_forum_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES game_forum_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
